items.title: Former ACT politician faces new charges after arrest for child grooming

children.content: Former ACT attorney-general Gordon Ramsay was to have been committed to trial in the ACT Supreme Court today, but instead his lawyers have asked for more time to prepare the case as he is facing seven additional charges.

image.altText: A man with short grey hair wearing a dark blue suit and glasses walks outside a court building looking serious.

items.title: Paramedic 'haunted' by woman's death at hands of partner has since quit job

children.content: Those affected by the murder of Tiffany Spence, who died from horrific injuries inflicted by her partner Adam Britt, tell a sentencing hearing of the long-term impacts of her death.

image.altText: A woman wearing a purple singlet top.

items.title: Brother believes pregnant 20yo Canberra woman could have been Ivan Milat's first victim

children.content: A family says its private investigation suggests Keren Rowland's 1971 disappearance and death is linked to serial killer Ivan Milat as an inquiry hears claims of missing records, lost exhibits and unanswered questions.

items.title: Drug harm advocates say recriminalising meth ignores evidence, adds stigma

children.content: Drug harm reduction advocates says there is little evidence that methamphetamine is more harmful in the ACT since being decriminalised, despite a Canberra Liberals commitment to recriminalise it if elected.

items.title: Court hears of 'tragic mistake' that caused fatal Canberra crash

children.content: The daughters of a motorcyclist killed in Canberra's north tried to reach him for their nightly phone call as he lay dying on the road, an ACT court has heard.

image.altText: A man with a beard smiles, wearing a hat that says Harley Davidson, sitting inside an eatery.

items.title: 'Straight to landfill': Compostable packaging but nowhere to compost it

children.content: The ACT mandates reusable, recyclable and compostable packaging at all public events, but nearly all of it ends up in landfill because there is no facility to compost it.

items.title: Quick hits: Cabo Verde finds player on LinkedIn, meet Merlin the Duck

children.content: Cabo Verde's incredible result against Spain brings with it no shortage of amazing stories, while a duck in a jersey is stealing hearts in Mexico. Here are today's quick hits from the World Cup.

articles.title: New Zealand denied maiden win as Iranians protest outside stadium

children.content: Protesters demonstrate outside the stadium as Iran opens its World Cup with a 2-2 draw against New Zealand, ending a day of stalemates.

items.title: PM confirms Treasury will release discussion paper for 'further input' on CGT changes
